  children={"Get Planning Unit List For Specified ProgramId and ProductCategoryId"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/program/{programId}/{productCategory}/planningUnit/all"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API used to get the Planning unit list for specified programId and ProductCategoryId

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"programId","in":"path","description":"programId that you want to get Planning unit list for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"name":"productCategoryId","in":"path","description":"productCategoryId that you want to get Planning unit list for","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
